label: New Transmittal
description: Clears the current form and starts a fresh transmittal. Any unsaved work will be lost, so save first if needed.

label: Open...
description: Opens a list of your previously saved transmittals so you can reopen and continue editing any of them.

label: Save / Update
description: Saves the current transmittal to the cloud database. If you are editing an existing transmittal, this updates it in place.

label: Export as PDF
description: Generates a print-ready PDF of the transmittal form and lets you download it locally or upload it directly to Google Drive.

label: Export as Word
description: Exports the transmittal as a DOCX file compatible with Microsoft Word and Google Docs.

label: Preview Word Document
description: Shows a rendered preview of the Word export inside the app before you download it.

label: Export as CSV
description: Exports the item list as a CSV spreadsheet, useful for logging or importing into other systems.

label: Email Recipient
description: Opens your default mail client with the recipient's email pre-filled, ready for you to attach the transmittal.

label: AI Key Settings
importantNote: Recommended — set your personal Gemini API key here to avoid shared quota limits and ensure AI parsing always works for you.
description: Opens the Gemini API key settings. You can save a personal AI key so the system uses your quota instead of the shared key.

label: Clear Workspace
description: Resets the current form fields without deleting the saved transmittal. Use this to start fresh from a blank slate.

label: Sign Out
description: Signs you out of Smart Transmittal. Your saved transmittals stay in the database and will be there when you sign back in.
